title: Japan’s Brokerage War: Rakuten Lowers Entry Barriers, Webull Eyes Quant Traders, and Woodstock Cracks the Onboarding Code
tags: Woodstock brings “Robinhood Moment” to Japan with Zero-Fee, 24-Hour US Stock Trading LaunchWoodstock has completed a sweeping overhaul of its service model, introducing 24-hour trading capability and completely eliminating transaction fees for US stocks. The announcement was made during a media briefing held in Tokyo, where Woodstock CEO Brian Yun outlined the company’s aggressive strategy to capture the burgeoning interest inJapan FinTech ObserverNorbert Gehrke
